readings.summary: I set before you here this day a blessing and a curse.

readings.citation:
Ps 31:2–3, 3–4, 17, 25
Lord, be my rock of safety.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 31:2–3, 3–4, 17, 25
Lord, be my rock of safety.

readings.summary: A person is justified by faith apart from works of the law.

I am the vine, you are the branches, says the Lord;
whoever remains in me and I in him will bear much fruit.
The house built on rock, and the house built on sand.

antiphons.text:
Turn to me and have mercy on me, O Lord,
for I am alone and poor.
See my lowliness and suffering
and take away all my sins, my God

To you I call, for you will surely heed me, O God;
turn your ear to me; hear my words.

Amen, I say to you: Whatever you ask for in prayer,
believe you will receive it,
and it will be yours, says the Lord.

penitentialAct.title: Kyrie • Misa Del Mundo
penitentialAct.composer: Only if needed. Talk to presider!
